boards.enterNewName: Enter a new name for your dashboard.
boards.enterName: Enter a name for your new board.

classes.title: My Classes
classes.description: Manage your class rosters here. The active class is used by seating charts, random picker, polls, and more.
classes.emptySubtitle: Create a class or import from ClassLink to get started.
classes.classLinkImportSubtitle: Pick a class to import as a new roster.
classes.classLinkMergeSubtitle: Pick the ClassLink class whose students should be pulled in. Existing students are preserved.
classes.pasteFullNames: Paste full names or group names here...
classes.bulkPasteTip: Tip: paste multiple names at once to add in bulk.
classes.emptyRosterSubtitle: Click + Add Student or paste a list of names into a row.
classes.restrictionsEmptyRoster: Add more students to set restrictions.
classes.restrictionsFooter: Restrictions apply to both students automatically.

plcs.title: My PLCs
plcs.description: Professional Learning Communities let you and your colleagues collaborate on the same assignments and see combined results.
plcs.inviteHelp: Your colleague will see the invitation in their PLC sidebar the next time they sign in.
plcs.noInvitesSubtitle: You’ll see invitations here when a colleague invites you to their PLC.
plcs.emptySubtitle: Create a PLC and invite your colleagues by email.
plcs.emptyHasInvites: You have pending invitations — accept one to get started.
plcs.confirmLeave: Leave "{{name}}"? You’ll lose access to shared assignment results.
plcs.confirmDelete: Delete "{{name}}"? This will remove the PLC for everyone.

settings.googleDriveDescription: Your boards and assets are automatically backed up to your "{{appName}}" folder in Drive.
settings.myBuildingsDescription: Select the building(s) you work in. Widgets like Instructional Routines will automatically show content for your grade level. Select multiple if you work across buildings.
settings.noBuildingSelected: No building selected — widgets will show all available content.
settings.skipConfirmation: Skip the confirmation prompt when closing widgets.
settings.quickAccessDescription: Select up to 2 widgets to appear when the dock is minimized.
settings.dockPositionDescription: Choose where the dock appears on your screen.
settings.languageDescription: Choose your preferred display language for the entire board.

sidebar.confirmClearBoard: Are you sure you want to close ALL widget windows?

errors.notSignedIn: You must be signed in to do that.
errors.accountEmailRequired: An account email is required to create a PLC.
errors.leadCannotLeave: The lead must transfer leadership before leaving the PLC.
errors.leadCannotBeRemoved: The lead cannot be removed; transfer leadership or delete the PLC.
errors.notAMember: That person is not a member of this PLC.
errors.targetNotActiveMember: You can only transfer leadership to an active member.
errors.cannotDemoteLead: Use "Transfer leadership" to change who leads the PLC.
errors.invalidRole: That is not a valid PLC role.
errors.alreadyLead: That member is already the lead of this PLC.
errors.orgRequired: PLCs are only available to members of an organization.

commonAssessment.emptySubtitle: Designate one in Shared Data, then review the pooled results together.

actionItems.emptySubtitle: Action items assigned to you will appear here.

video.ctaDisabledDrive: Connect Google Drive to assign a video activity.
video.ctaDisabledEmpty: You have no video activities in your personal library yet. Create one in the Video Activity widget first.

assignmentsLibrary.unshareConfirm: Remove "{{title}}" from this PLC? Teammates who have already added it to their board keep their copy.
assignmentsLibrary.unshareTooltip: Remove from PLC (any member can unshare; existing imports keep working)
assignmentsLibrary.importFailed: Failed to add assignment to your board.
assignmentsLibrary.driveRequired: Connect Google Drive in your account to pick up PLC assignments.
assignmentsLibrary.driveDisconnected: Connect Google Drive to pick up PLC assignments onto your board.
assignmentsLibrary.emptySubtitle: Toggle "Share with PLC" on any quiz assignment you create — it'll show up here so teammates can pick it up onto their own boards.

assignmentsInProgress.heading: Live Across the Team
assignmentsInProgress.emptySubtitle: When you or a teammate starts a PLC-mode assignment, it shows up here. Pause or stop it from your board and the row updates live.

members.heading: Members
members.confirmTransfer: Make {{email}} the lead of this PLC? You will become a regular member.
members.confirmLeave: Leave this PLC? You will lose access to shared assignment results.
members.alreadyMember: That email is already a member of this PLC.
members.inviteError: Could not send invite. Try again in a moment.
members.notManager: Only the PLC lead or a co-lead can invite, remove, or change members.

completedAssignments.heading: Shared Results
completedAssignments.emptySubtitle: When a PLC-mode assignment is stopped from any teammate's board, it lands here with a link to the shared results sheet.

settings.heading: Dashboard Sections
settings.description: Choose which sections appear in this PLC's dashboard. Any PLC member can update these.

quizzes.title: Quiz Library
quizzes.description: Share quizzes with the PLC. Members can sync edits or copy a quiz into their own library.

videoActivities.title: Video Activities
videoActivities.description: Share video-based activities and aggregate completion data with the PLC.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: A shared notebook for the PLC.

todos.title: To-Do List
todos.description: A shared checklist so the PLC can track action items.

sharedBoards.title: Shared Boards
sharedBoards.description: Surface dashboards shared with this PLC.

digest.heading: Notifications
digest.description: Control how this PLC stays in the loop.
digest.title: Weekly email digest
digest.optInDescription: Send every member one weekly email summarizing what happened in the PLC. Off by default; any member can change this.

overview.heading: Overview
overview.editHint: Drag tiles by the grip, click the corner to resize, click the eye to hide.
overview.confirmReset: Reset your bento layout to the default arrangement? Tile sizes and order will be restored.

completedAssignments.heading: Recent results
completedAssignments.emptySubtitle: Quizzes you run with PLC mode appear here.

todos.heading: To-do list
todos.emptySubtitle: Add action items in the To-Do tab.

sharedSheet.heading: Shared sheet
sharedSheet.connectedHint: Aggregated PLC results land in this Google Sheet. All members can open it.
sharedSheet.unsetHint: No shared sheet yet — it will be created automatically when the first PLC quiz is run.

quizLibrary.heading: Quiz Library
quizLibrary.emptySubtitle: Share a quiz from the kebab on its library card.

videoActivities.title: Video activities
videoActivities.teaser: Share video activities with the PLC.

notes.heading: Notes
notes.emptySubtitle: Create the first one to get started.
notes.confirmDelete: Delete this note? This cannot be undone.
notes.createFailed: Couldn't create that note. Please try again.
notes.pickOrCreate: Select a note to edit, or create a new one.
notes.conflictMessage: A teammate edited this note while you were writing. Reload to see their changes — your unsaved text is kept below.

todos.addPlaceholder: Add a to-do for the PLC…

quizLibrary.heading: Shared Quizzes
quizLibrary.emptySubtitle: Open the Quiz widget in your dashboard, click the kebab on any quiz, and choose "Share with PLC" to add it here.
quizLibrary.alreadySynced: "{{title}}" is already synced to your library.
quizLibrary.unshareTeammate: Unshare from PLC (any member can remove)
quizLibrary.unshareConfirm: Remove "{{title}}" from this PLC? Other teammates will lose access to the shared library entry. Their personal copies (if any) keep working.
quizLibrary.editTooltipAutoImport: Edit collaboratively — adds to your library on first edit
quizLibrary.editAutoImported: "{{title}}" added to your library — opening editor.
quizLibrary.editSaved: Quiz saved — teammates will sync automatically.
quizLibrary.editConflict: Another teacher published an update to this quiz. We pulled their changes; your unsaved edits were not saved. Reopen the quiz to re-apply.
quizLibrary.driveRequired: Connect Google Drive in your account to import PLC quizzes.
quizLibrary.driveRequiredForEdit: Connect Google Drive in your account to edit PLC quizzes.
quizLibrary.driveDisconnected: Connect Google Drive to import PLC quizzes into your personal library.

presence.heading: Who’s here
presence.nobodyHere: No one else is here right now

activity.heading: Activity
activity.sinceSubtitle: What happened while you were away
activity.caughtUpSubtitle: No new activity since your last visit.

comments.heading: Comments
comments.placeholder: Write a comment… use @ to mention a teammate
comments.postFailed: Couldn’t post your comment. Try again.
comments.deleteFailed: Couldn’t delete that comment. Try again.
comments.viewerReadOnly: Viewers can read comments but not post.

sharedData.emptySubtitle: When members run a common assessment with PLC mode, anonymized results appear here.
sharedData.updatingHint: New results are still being rolled up — numbers will refresh shortly.
sharedData.designateTitle: Make this the team's common assessment
sharedData.designateSubtitle: Designating gives it a shared title, unit, and status the whole team tracks.
sharedData.designatePrompt: Name this common assessment so the whole team recognizes it.
sharedData.designated: “{{title}}” is now the team's common assessment.
sharedData.designateFailed: Couldn't designate that assessment. Try again.

meeting.createFailed: Couldn’t start the meeting. Try again.
meeting.saved: Meeting saved. The team can review the record anytime.
meeting.saveFailed: Couldn’t save the meeting. Try again.
meeting.pickRequired: Pick at least one assessment to review.
meeting.strongAcross: Strong across the board — every question cleared 80%.
meeting.updatingHint: New results are still rolling up — numbers refresh shortly.
meeting.discussQuestion: Discuss this question in a decision
meeting.designatePrompt: Name this common assessment so the whole team recognizes it.
meeting.designated: “{{title}}” is now the team’s common assessment.
meeting.designateFailed: Couldn’t designate that assessment. Try again.
meeting.startOverConfirm: Start a new meeting? This clears the current selections and notes.

pick.heading: What are we looking at today?
pick.subtitle: Choose the common assessment (or assessments) this meeting reviews.
pick.emptySubtitle: When the team runs a common assessment in PLC mode, the anonymized results appear here, ready to review together.

review.heading: What does the data say?
review.subtitle: Pooled, anonymized results. Click a question to capture a decision about it.
review.none: No assessments selected — go back to Pick.

decide.heading: What did we decide?
decide.subtitle: Capture the team’s decisions. Link one to a data card from Review when it responds to a specific result.
decide.placeholder: e.g. Reteach question 4 using the area model before the unit test.

act.heading: Who’s doing what?
act.subtitle: Spin up action items. On save, each becomes a tracked PLC to-do for its assignee.
act.placeholder: e.g. Build a reteach warm-up for question 4

save.heading: Ready to save?
save.subtitle: Saving writes the meeting record, turns action items into to-dos, and logs it to the team activity feed.
save.noAttendees: No one else is active right now — you’ll be recorded as the facilitator.
save.viewerNote: Viewers can follow along but can’t save the meeting record.
save.doneSubtitle: Action items are now tracked to-dos for their assignees. Export the record for your accountability files, or start a new meeting.

export.sheetDone: Meeting record exported to Google Sheets.
export.noGoogle: Connect your Google account to export the meeting record.
export.notReady: The meeting record isn’t loaded yet. Try again.

record.title: Meeting record
record.notFoundBody: It may have been deleted, or you opened a stale link.

trash.heading: Trash
trash.description: Deleted items stay here for 30 days, then are removed permanently.
trash.restoreFailed: Couldn’t restore that item. Try again.
trash.autoPurgeNote: Items in Trash are permanently deleted after 30 days.
trash.loadError: Couldn't load Trash. Please try again.

versions.title: Version history
versions.intro: Recent saved versions of this shared assessment. Restoring re-publishes that version to everyone — the current version is kept in history too.
versions.emptySubtitle: Earlier versions appear here after the next edit is published.
versions.restored: Restored version {{version}} of "{{title}}". Teammates sync on next refresh.
versions.restoreFailed: Couldn’t restore that version. Try again.
versions.conflict: Another teacher just published an update. We reloaded the version history — review it and try the restore again.

sync.autoPulled: "{{title}}" updated to your teammate’s latest version.
sync.autoPullFailed: Couldn’t pull the latest version of "{{title}}". We’ll retry on the next update.
sync.conflictBody: A teammate published a new version of "{{title}}" while you have unsaved edits. Keep your edits, or pull their version (your unsaved edits will be discarded)?
sync.keptMine: Kept your edits to "{{title}}". You can publish them to share with your team.
sync.pulledTheirs: Pulled your teammate’s version of "{{title}}". Your unsaved edits were discarded.
sync.resolveFailed: Couldn’t resolve the sync conflict for "{{title}}". Try again.

viewer.badgeTooltip: You have viewer access to this PLC. You can read everything, but creating, editing, and deleting are turned off.
viewer.assessmentsNote: Viewers can browse shared assessments but can’t share, edit, or assign them.
viewer.notesNote: Viewers can read notes and docs but can’t add or change them.
viewer.todosNote: Viewers can read the to-do list but can’t add or change items.
viewer.meetingNote: Viewers can follow the meeting but can’t edit or save it.
viewer.homeNote: Viewers can read everything here but can’t create new content.

resources.emptySubtitle: Your admin will push curated quizzes, docs, and boards here.
resources.inboxSubtitle: Curated by your admin. Click "Use" to add to your PLC.
